name: PDFMonkey Document Generation API
what_it_does: API for generating PDFs from HTML templates — agents pass data to pre-built templates and receive downloadable PDF documents, supporting dynamic content, custom fonts, headers/footers, and batch generation.
use_cases: Generating invoices, contracts, and reports as PDFs from agent-provided data
Automating certificate and credential generation from template data
Creating branded PDF documents for customer-facing outputs from CRM data
Batch generating thousands of personalized documents from data arrays
Building document automation workflows without managing PDF rendering infrastructure
not_for: PDF editing or manipulation of existing PDFs (use PDFco or iLovePDF)
Real-time PDF generation requiring sub-second response (async workflow)
Self-hosted PDF generation without cloud dependency (use Gotenberg)
best_when: An agent generates structured PDF documents from templates with dynamic data, needing reliable rendering without browser infrastructure management.
avoid_when: You need to manipulate existing PDFs or self-host the generation pipeline.

auth.notes: API key from PDFMonkey dashboard. Passed as Bearer token. Single key per workspace. Webhook signing for secure delivery confirmation.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter $29/month (1,000 docs); Growth $79/month (5,000 docs); Business from $199/month
pricing.notes: Document-based pricing. Templates created in web UI — API submits data to templates. Competitive pricing for document automation. Batch generation available on paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; async generation recommended for batch

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clean API reference documentation. Webhook delivery for generation completion. Error responses include template validation errors and data binding issues. SDK available for common languages.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Document generation creates a new document each call — not idempotent by default. Use webhook delivery rather than polling for completion.
known_agent_gotchas: PDF generation is async — agents must poll status or use webhooks for completion
Templates created in web UI — not API-manageable (UI-first workflow)
Generated documents expire after 7 days — download promptly or store externally
EU data residency — data sent to PDFMonkey servers for rendering

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token auth. GDPR compliant (EU-based). Document data transmitted to servers for rendering — consider data sensitivity. Webhook signatures for secure delivery.
